Research and citations related to the Josquin Research Project

2015

  • Andrew Kirkman. " Review: The Josquin Research Project by Jesse Rodin and Craig Sapp," Journal of the American Musicological Society, Vol. 68 No. 2 (Summer 2015). pp. 455–465.

2013

Reseach project reports from CS 229: Machine Learning (Andrew Ng, Stanford University, Autumn 2013):

  • Phillip Lee, Kate Stuckman, Zachary Sunberg. Attribution of Musical Works to Josquin des Prez. (Local copy)
  • Jacqueline Speiser, Vishesh Gupta. Composer Style Attribution. (Local copy)
  • Kevin Laube, Naroa Zurutuza. Composer Style Attribution. (Local copy)
  • Fang-Chieh Chou, Yi-Hong Kyuo, Hsiang-Yu Yang. Reveal Hidden Information in Music Scores: Composer Attribution. (Local copy)
  • Alex Adamson. Application of Classification Algorithms to Renaissance Music Attribution (Local copy)
